caption: A man with blonde hair and headphones, wearing a dark t-shirt, is seen in a small window in the lower-left corner of the screen, speaking toward a microphone in a room featuring a decorated Christmas tree and a computer monitor. To his right, a large digital sports card is displayed against a purple background. The card features a football player in a blue and white uniform with the number "81" on his jersey, alongside text identifying him as "DONNU SMITH" with a position of "TE" and an overall rating of "83". The letters "GG" appear in yellow at the bottom of the card. Across the sequence of frames, the man continues to speak with slight changes in his facial expression and posture, while the digital card and the background remain static and unchanged.
